abort.no_devices_found: No connectable BLE devices found nearby.

error.invalid_format: Invalid input format. Please check UUID or hex values.
error.notify_uuid_required: Notify UUID is required when using notify patterns or status query command.

user.title: Select BLE Device
user.description: Select the BLE device you want to control.

type.title: Select Entity Type
type.description: Choose the type of entity to create.

switch.title: Switch Configuration
switch.description: Enter BLE GATT Service/Characteristic info and ON/OFF data.

data_description.service_uuid: BLE GATT service UUID of the device. Connect to the device in nRF Connect app to find it in the service list
data_description.char_uuid: Characteristic UUID with Write property to send commands to. Expand the service in nRF Connect to find the Write characteristic
data_description.data_on: Hex bytes sent to the device when switching ON (e.g. 0aa5010101)
data_description.data_off: Hex bytes sent to the device when switching OFF (e.g. 0aa5010100)
data_description.write_with_response: When checked, waits for device ACK after BLE Write. If the device does not support this, commands will hang. Leave unchecked if unsure. Must be unchecked if nRF Connect shows only 'Write Without Response' (0x04)
data_description.keep_alive: When checked, checks BLE connection every 60s while HA is running and auto-reconnects if disconnected. When unchecked, connects only when sending commands and auto-disconnects after 15s of inactivity

button.title: Button Configuration
button.description: Enter BLE GATT Service/Characteristic info and command data.

data_description.service_uuid: BLE GATT service UUID of the device. Connect to the device in nRF Connect app to find it in the service list
data_description.char_uuid: Characteristic UUID with Write property to send commands to. Expand the service in nRF Connect to find the Write characteristic
data_description.data_press: Hex bytes sent to the device when button is pressed
data_description.write_with_response: When checked, waits for device ACK after BLE Write. If the device does not support this, commands will hang. Leave unchecked if unsure
data_description.keep_alive: When checked, checks BLE connection every 60s while HA is running and auto-reconnects if disconnected. When unchecked, connects only when sending commands and auto-disconnects after 15s of inactivity

select.title: Select Configuration
select.description:
Enter BLE GATT Service/Characteristic info and options.
Format: 'label=hexdata', one per line.

data_description.service_uuid: BLE GATT service UUID of the device. Connect to the device in nRF Connect app to find it in the service list
data_description.char_uuid: Characteristic UUID with Write property to send commands to. Expand the service in nRF Connect to find the Write characteristic
data_description.options:
One per line in 'label=hexdata' format. Example:
Mode1=0aa50101
Mode2=0aa50102
data_description.write_with_response: When checked, waits for device ACK after BLE Write. If the device does not support this, commands will hang. Leave unchecked if unsure
data_description.keep_alive: When checked, checks BLE connection every 60s while HA is running and auto-reconnects if disconnected. When unchecked, connects only when sending commands and auto-disconnects after 15s of inactivity

notify.title: Notify Configuration (Optional)
notify.description: Use Notify to detect the actual ON/OFF state of the device. Leave empty to skip if unsure.

data_description.notify_uuid: Characteristic UUID with Notify property that the device uses to push state changes. Find it in nRF Connect under the same service — look for the Notify property
data_description.notify_on_pattern: Hex byte pattern found in Notify responses when the device is ON. If this pattern is contained in the response data, the device is considered ON (e.g. 0101)
data_description.notify_off_pattern: Hex byte pattern found in Notify responses when the device is OFF. If this pattern is contained in the response data, the device is considered OFF (e.g. 0100)
data_description.status_query_data: Hex command sent to the device right after BLE connection to ask 'what is your current state?'. The device responds via Notify. When Keep Alive is enabled, this is sent automatically on every reconnect

error.invalid_format: Invalid input format. Please check UUID or hex values.
error.notify_uuid_required: Notify UUID is required when using notify patterns or status query command.

switch_options.title: Switch Settings
switch_options.description: Change ON/OFF data and Notify settings.

data_description.data_on: Hex bytes sent to the device when switching ON (e.g. 0aa5010101)
data_description.data_off: Hex bytes sent to the device when switching OFF (e.g. 0aa5010100)
data_description.write_with_response: When checked, waits for device ACK after BLE Write. If the device does not support this, commands will hang. Leave unchecked if unsure
data_description.keep_alive: When checked, checks BLE connection every 60s while HA is running and auto-reconnects if disconnected. When unchecked, connects only when sending commands and auto-disconnects after 15s of inactivity
data_description.notify_uuid: Characteristic UUID with Notify property that the device uses to push state changes
data_description.notify_on_pattern: Hex pattern in Notify responses when device is ON. If contained in response, device is considered ON (e.g. 0101)
data_description.notify_off_pattern: Hex pattern in Notify responses when device is OFF. If contained in response, device is considered OFF (e.g. 0100)
data_description.status_query_data: Hex command sent right after BLE connection to ask current state. Auto-sent on every reconnect when Keep Alive is enabled

data_description.data_press: Hex bytes sent to the device when button is pressed
data_description.write_with_response: When checked, waits for device ACK after BLE Write. If the device does not support this, commands will hang. Leave unchecked if unsure
data_description.keep_alive: When checked, checks BLE connection every 60s while HA is running and auto-reconnects if disconnected. When unchecked, connects only when sending commands and auto-disconnects after 15s of inactivity

data_description.options:
One per line in 'label=hexdata' format. Example:
Mode1=0aa50101
Mode2=0aa50102
data_description.write_with_response: When checked, waits for device ACK after BLE Write. If the device does not support this, commands will hang. Leave unchecked if unsure
data_description.keep_alive: When checked, checks BLE connection every 60s while HA is running and auto-reconnects if disconnected. When unchecked, connects only when sending commands and auto-disconnects after 15s of inactivity
